name: The Bible Bus
tagline: A year-long scripture reading journey through the entire Bible — about 15 minutes a day.
about: Getting to know God, intimately. The Bible Bus is a transformative year-long scripture reading journey from Genesis to Revelation. New groups depart quarterly (January, April, July, October) with about 15 minutes of daily reading.

name: Family Tree
tagline: Blood-related family tree — map people, connections, and lineage.
about: An interactive family tree focused on blood-related lineage. Explore people, connections, and family structure in one place.

name: Hibret Edir
tagline: Ethiopian mutual aid in Greater LA — community support when a loved one is lost.
about: Hibret Edir Association serves the Greater Los Angeles Ethiopian community with mutual funeral support. Founded in 2011 — members contribute so no family faces burial costs alone.

name: Wegene Family Mahaber
tagline: Member-only hosting tracker for the family mahaber rotation.
about: A member-only hosting tracker for Wegene Family Mahaber. Tracks whose turn it is to host, pass, or get ready in the automatic rotation.

name: Kids Mahaber
tagline: Kids Mahaber community site — gatherings, updates, and connection.
about: Kids Mahaber community site on Netlify — gatherings, hosting rotation, and connection.

name: Tesfa Counseling
tagline: Virtual counseling for Ethiopians and Ethiopian families across the diaspora.
about: Tesfa (ተስፋ) means hope. Virtual counseling for Ethiopians and Ethiopian families worldwide — culturally informed sessions for individuals, couples, families, and young adults.

name: DB Advocacy Group
tagline: Hope for Debre Berhan’s children — daily meals for displaced kids in the IDP camp.
about: Debre Berhan Advocacy Group supports displaced children with daily meals (breakfast, lunch, snack) at the IDP camp. Mission: no child should endure hunger.

name: Ethio AI Solutions
tagline: AI agents and workflow automation for small businesses — without the enterprise price tag.
about: AI agents, workflow automation, and custom dashboards for small businesses. Practical automation without enterprise complexity or pricing.

name: School of Life
tagline: A Christ-centered path from empty success to Spirit-led life in every domain.
about: A master framework rooted in Scripture: from the rat race and hidden conflict to surrender, the shift, and a Spirit-led walk in every domain of life.

name: Royal Family
tagline: Interactive royal family tree — explore relationships across the lineage.
about: Interactive Royal Family Tree. Explore lineage, find relationships between people, and contribute verified family information.

name: Cousin's CrossConnect
tagline: Map how cousins connect — see each person’s place in the family web.
about: Cousin's CrossConnect shows how relatives link to each other across the family. Browse each person and the cousins connected around them.

name: Personal notes
tagline: Private scratchpad for ideas, links, and planning.
about: Private space for ideas, links, and planning. Expand this note anytime.

name: Lab archive
tagline: Older experiments kept for reference — not public demos.
about: Archive of older experiments kept for reference. Add project notes here as you organize.
